form.formComment: Second up after running 6th (Fr1) over 2070m after showing early speed at Gawler was 4th-5.1 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Linxx (2:33.30) in NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $101. Needs to do more. May need more racing.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1800m at this track, beaten 11 m by Neds Beach (2:12.80) in NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $13. Strong claims.

form.formComment: Last start a big 8 m win as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at Victor Harbor (2:02.80) beating Neds Beach in NR up to 43 on April 5 at $2.10.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr1) over 1800m at this track beaten 5 m by Neds Beach (2:12.80) in NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $8. At his previous start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1800m at this track, beaten 5.5 m by Rocknroll Yankee (2:13.30) in NR 44 to 49 on March 28 at $17. Draws well and has the ability to figure prominently.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 5.5 m after showing early speed, (Fr6) at this track (2:15.70) beating Waitpinga Storm in 3yo+ 1 LIFETIME WIN on March 21 at $34 at the bell was 3rd-4. Hard to leave out on current form. In winning form but draws wide.
